'''鈭歬-w-dh-p''' ('''kakawdhepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:itch|itch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:itch|itch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-w-dh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kakawdhepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikawdhepoko|thikawdhepoko]] || [[word:jikawdhepoko|jikawdhepoko]] || [[word:shikawdhepoko|shikawdhepoko]] || [[word:kikawdhepoko|kikawdhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukawdhepoko|thuthukawdhepoko]] || [[word:jujukawdhepoko|jujukawdhepoko]] || [[word:shushukawdhepoko|shushukawdhepoko]] || [[word:kukukawdhepoko|kukukawdhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukawdhepoko|thukawdhepoko]] || [[word:jukawdhepoko|jukawdhepoko]] || [[word:shukawdhepoko|shukawdhepoko]] || [[word:kukawdhepoko|kukawdhepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukawdhepoko|thukawdhepoko]] || [[word:jukawdhepoko|jukawdhepoko]] || [[word:shukawdhepoko|shukawdhepoko]] || [[word:kukawdhepoko|kukawdhepoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokawdhepoko|thokawdhepoko]] || [[word:jokawdhepoko|jokawdhepoko]] || [[word:shokawdhepoko|shokawdhepoko]] || [[word:kokawdhepoko|kokawdhepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokawdhepoko|thokawdhepoko]] || [[word:jokawdhepoko|jokawdhepoko]] || [[word:shokawdhepoko|shokawdhepoko]] || [[word:kokawdhepoko|kokawdhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kawdhepoko|th忙kawdhepoko]] || [[word:j忙kawdhepoko|j忙kawdhepoko]] || [[word:sh忙kawdhepoko|sh忙kawdhepoko]] || [[word:k忙kawdhepoko|k忙kawdhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakawdhepoko|thathakawdhepoko]] || [[word:jajakawdhepoko|jajakawdhepoko]] || [[word:shashakawdhepoko|shashakawdhepoko]] || [[word:kakakawdhepoko|kakakawdhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakawdhepoko|thakawdhepoko]] || [[word:jakawdhepoko|jakawdhepoko]] || [[word:shakawdhepoko|shakawdhepoko]] || [[word:kakawdhepoko|kakawdhepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakawdhepoko|thakawdhepoko]] || [[word:jakawdhepoko|jakawdhepoko]] || [[word:shakawdhepoko|shakawdhepoko]] || [[word:kakawdhepoko|kakawdhepoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
